LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. AFTER HEARING, PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT'S MOTION TO APPROVE AND ENTER CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT APPROVED THE SETTLEMENT; IT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF PROP. 65 AND THE HEALTH & SAFETY CODE. THE AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES AND ANY PENALTY AMOUNT ARE REASONABLE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Off Calendar

Mtn To Approve And Enter Consent Judgmnt
Off Calendar Jan-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ellison Folk, Esq. of Shute Mihaly & Weinberger LLP, Tel. 415.552.7272, for plaintiff and moving party;
Carolyn Collins, Esq. of Nixon Peabody LLP Tel. 415.984.8325, for defendant Procter & Gamble.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT's Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment is granted. The court approved the settlement; it complies with the requirements of Prop. 65 and the Health & Safety Code. The award of attorneys' fees and any penalty amount are reasonable. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
